title: 6 Pack GU10 LED Spot Bulbs Dimmable 5W, Replacement 50W Halogen Spotlight Bulb, Warm White 2700K, AC 220-240V, 120°Beam Angle, Energy Saving, MR16 Reflector Bulb for Hallway, Ceiling Spotlight
features: 【0-100% Dimmable】GU10 LED bulbs are compatible with most dimming switches and dimmers. Continuously dim from 0% to 100% without flickering. Start immediately without delay. CRI>80, no UV radiation, can better protect your eyes.

【90% Energy Saving】5W GU10 LED reflector bulbs can replace 50W halogen lamps. Compared with traditional lamps, low energy consumption saves up to 90% electricity costs and provides optimal light output.

【Warm White 2700K】LED bulbs have a 120° wide beam angle and 500 lumens of light output. The reflector cup emits a comfortable 2700K warm white light, creating a warmer light and a comfortable and cozy atmosphere.

【Up to 25000 Hours Lifespan】High-quality materials, high brightness and low power consumption make MR16LED lamps longer than traditional halogen lamps, with an average lifespan of 25000 hours, which is very durable.
【 Easy to Instal】Compatible with standard MR16 GU10 lamp socket, plug and play, very easy to replace old halogen bulbs. Instant full brightness. No buzzing and flickering.

【Application】GU10 bulbs can be used to replace ceiling embedded lamps, downlights, and track lights. Very suitable for spotlighting in living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, corridors, landscapes, exhibitions, restaurants and other places.

specifications_table.Special Features: Energy saving 90%, Replace 50W halogen lamp, 0-100% Dimmable, Standard MR16 shape, No flicker, No glare, 120° Beam angle
specifications_table.Specific Uses: Spotlight for accent or indirect lighting. GU10 spotlights can be replaced in tracks, spotlights and recessed lights
